description: opium eyewear is a range of addictive sunglasses stylised for international fashions and incorporating impeccable quality standards. Wear these opium sunglasses to look stylish while out and about in the sunshine. The glasses come in a fabric lined, hard case with branding on the front and a zip fastening, microfibre pouch included to protect the sunglasses. Lens width: 65 mm Lens colour: Black Frame colour: Black and red Warranty: One year Optimatrix lenses for superior impact protection, scratch resistance and distortion free vision UV protection Stylish acrylic frame with cut-out and red detail on arms Branding on sides Fixed hinges for Fit Fixed pads to hold the glasses in place, ensuring there is no friction with the skin Care Polish with the microfibre pouch to remove dust Do not put your sunglasses face down on a table or on heated areas like the dashboard of a car Keep in the original case in a dry place at a temperature between -10° C and +35° C
